title: Brazilian Shrimp Skewers with Garlic Crust
description: A flavorful and colorful dish inspired by Brazilian cuisine, featuring succulent shrimp skewers with a crispy garlicky crust.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together garlic, crispy, and brazilian.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat.
Thread the shrimp onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Brush with oil during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
